# Weekly Curation Digest
**Date:** 2026-06-07
**Target Audience:** Enterprise Consultants, ML Engineers, and Architects
**Model Used:** openai/gpt-4o
**Filter State:** No Temporal Filters

## 1. Executive Summary

This week's signal is dominated by a sobering reality check on AI spending and organizational readiness, even as the pace of model releases and platform announcements accelerates. Uber's cap on employee AI spending after burning through its budget in four months serves as a cautionary ...
